problem id: c628dd06
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) AND SHL(4)) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  10111011 -> 00111011
  10010000 -> 00001001
  00000010 -> 00000000
  11100110 -> 01001110
  11100001 -> 00001110
  11000010 -> 00001100
  00100010 -> 00000010
  10101111 -> 01011010
  10011111 -> 00111001
  10000010 -> 00001000

query: 01101011
predicted answer: 10010110
